creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-05-19 10:42:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/pms            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    audio/pms/files      patch-src_pms.cpp 
  Log:
  Practical Music Search is an open source ncurses client for Music
  Player Daemon, written in C++. The target audience are power users who
  need an MPD client that is highly configurable and accessible. PMS
  features a simple but powerful interface similar to Vim, and runs on
  (at least) Linux and Mac OS X.
  
  WWW:    http://pms.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/146530
  Submitted by:   Ashish SHUKLA <wahjava@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1109    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/audio/pms/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/pms/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +16 -0     ports/audio/pms/files/patch-src_pms.cpp (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/audio/pms/pkg-descr (new)
